title: Meeting Prep Autopilot - Prep Notes
description: Meeting preparation records generated by the Meeting Prep Autopilot pipeline. Each row represents one prepared meeting with attendee context, source tracking, and a link to the full prep page.

Event ID.description: Calendar event identifier — primary lookup key and page title.

Meeting Title.description: Human-readable meeting name pulled from the calendar event.

Attendees.description: Comma-separated attendee names extracted from the calendar event.

Sources Used.description: Which data sources successfully contributed to this prep note.

Prep Page.description: Link to the generated Notion prep page containing full meeting context and talking points.

Generated At.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the prep note was generated.

Meeting Type.description: Classification of the meeting type for prioritization and template selection.

Importance Score.description: Meeting importance on a 1-5 scale, used for prep prioritization.

notes: The prep-lead agent searches for this database by name ('Meeting Prep Autopilot - Prep Notes') before creating it. Lazy-created on first pipeline run. One row per calendar event — duplicate Event IDs are overwritten with the latest prep.
